# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-api-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-service-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
  port: 9000
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-proxy-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: unknown

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8443
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: metrics-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-api
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-api-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: production

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-auth-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: production

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-auth-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api
          namespace: production
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: database-proxy-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api
          namespace: production
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: production

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-payment-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api
          namespace: production
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-order-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api
          namespace: production
        - name: frontend
          namespace: production

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-to-notification
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: production

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: prometheus-scrape-metrics
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: metrics-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: admin-api-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
  port: 8888
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: admin-api-access
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: admin-api-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: admin-console
          namespace: production
      identities:
        - "admin.production.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: cache-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis-cache
  port: 6379
  proxyProtocol: unknown

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: services-to-cache
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: cache-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api
          namespace: production
        - name: frontend
          namespace: production
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: message-queue-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: rabbitmq
  port: 5672
  proxyProtocol: unknown

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: services-to-message-queue
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: message-queue-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: production
        - name: notification-service
          namespace: production

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: grpc-api-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: grpc-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-grpc-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: grpc-api-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api
          namespace: production

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: external-api-gateway
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 443
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: gateway-to-services
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: production

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: cross-namespace-monitoring
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        component: metrics
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring
        - name: grafana
          namespace: monitoring

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: health-check-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      tier: backend
  port: 8086
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: health-check-access
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: health-check-server
  client:
    unauthenticated: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: internal-api-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: internal-api
  port: 8082
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: internal-services-only
  namespace: production
spec:
  server:
    name: internal-api-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-api
          namespace: production
        - name: order-service
          namespace: production
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: production
      unauthenticatedTLS: false
